message:
fix(runtime): locale override proptest drops guards in LIFO order

The overrides_are_lifo proptest stored LocaleOverride guards in a Vec.
When the Vec went out of scope, elements were dropped front-to-back,
but the override stack expects last-pushed-first-dropped (LIFO).
This triggered debug_assert_eq in LocaleOverride::Drop.

Fix: drain guards via pop() to ensure LIFO drop ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
